name: Chat Message
desc: Server sends a chat message or command response to the client.

fields.name: chatComponent
fields.desc: The chat message or command response

fields.name: type
fields.desc: 0 = chat box, 1 = system message (singleplayer), 2 = above hotbar

notes: Position 0 shows in chat box. Position 2 shows above the hotbar (action bar).

implementation.overview: S02PacketChat is the server→client chat packet. It carries a ChatComponent (JSON chat message) and a position byte (0=chat, 1=system, 2=actionbar). This is the most-intercepted clientbound packet because it carries EVERY chat message the player sees. AutoGG watches for game-end messages. NameProtect replaces the player's name. AutoTPA detects teleport requests. AutoPlay detects game-end for auto-queue. StreamerMode hides names in chat. DeathInsult detects death messages. FlagDetector reads anti-cheat flags from chat. The packet is received in NetHandlerPlayClient.handleChat() and modules hook via EventReceivePacket.

modules.name: AutoGG + AutoPlay
modules.purpose: Automatically sends GG or queues next game when a game ends.
modules.how_it_works: Read s02.getChatComponent().getUnformattedText(). If it contains patterns like "1st Killer - ", "Winner: ", "You died!", or "Game over", schedule sending C01PacketChatMessage with "gg" and/or "/play [mode]".

modules.name: NameProtect / StreamerMode
modules.purpose: Hide the player's real username in chat to protect privacy while streaming.
modules.how_it_works: Find all occurrences of mc.thePlayer.getName() in the chat component text. Replace with a placeholder like "You" or "Protected". Cancel the real packet, print the modified version to chat.

modules.name: AutoTPA / AntiFreeze
modules.purpose: Auto-accept teleport requests or auto-respond to specific chat triggers.
modules.how_it_works: Check if chat text contains a trigger phrase like "teleport" or "frozen". If matched, send appropriate C01 response or trigger a module action.

modules.name: FlagDetector / AntiCheat Detection
modules.purpose: Detect when the anti-cheat warns/flags the player through chat.
modules.how_it_works: Read S02 chat messages for patterns like "Vulcan", "you are flying", "moving too fast", "suspicious movement". When detected, automatically disable or adjust modules.

implementation.general_hooks: NetHandlerPlayClient.handleChat() — the vanilla handler fires a chat event that modules hook. For interception, EventReceivePacket with instanceof S02PacketChat is most common. The chat component uses JSON (IChatComponent) which can be modified via ChatComponentText or ChatComponentTranslation.
implementation.client_variations:
Sigma 3.9: AutoGG + AutoTPA + StreamerMode all hook S02.
Tenacity 5.1: AutoGG + TPAKiller + AntiFreeze.
Jigsaw 0.26: Central onChatMessageRecived() dispatcher.
Memeware 7.3: DeathInsult detects death messages.
Helium B41420: AutoNoU auto-responds. AutoPlay detects game-end.
Gugustus: AutoRegister detects register prompts. Fly detects Vulcan in chat.
